California
Fair Political
Practices Cornmission
August 8, 199O
Dee Latimore-Berry
Seas j.de city clerk
city of seaside
440 Harcourt Ave.
P. O. Box 810
seaside, cA 9 3 9 55-0810
Your Request for Advice
our File No. 
A-90-487
Dear Ms. Latimore-Berry:
We have received your letter, dated July 13, L99O, seeking
written confirmation of the prior telephone advice provided to you
by the Commission. Your letter also requested advice on a clain
riised by Mayor Lancelot ltcclair that you may have a conflict of
j.nterest in assessj.ng fines pursuant to your duties under the
Political Reform Act (the "Act").r
OUESTTONS
1. 
Do penaltj,es assessed by the Commj.ssion Pursuant to
Section 83116 offset penalties assessed pursuant to section 91013
by a city clerk?
2. 
Does the seaside city C1erk who seeks to assess fines
against the city's mayor for violations of the Act have a conf I'ict
of interest?
CONCLUSIONS
1. 
Penalties assessed by the Commission pursuant to Section
83116 do not offset penalties assessed pursuant to Section 91013
by a city clerk.
2. 
The Seaside City Clerk who seeks to assess fines against
the city's mayor for violations of the Act does not have a
conf l-ict of interest under the Act.
1 
Go*r"..rment code sections 81ooo-91,015. A11 statutory refer-
ences are to the Government code unless otherwise indicated.
428 J Street, Suite 80O o P.O. Box 8O7 . Sacramento CA 958O4-O8O7 . (916)322'5660


Our Fi■e No.  A-90-487
Page 2
FACTS
Pursuant to section 91013 the City clerk for the City of
Seaside has assessed f j.nes in the amount of $4,82o against
Lancelot Mcclair, nayor of the city of Seaside. Mayor llcc1air is
also currently subject to Commission action, Lancelot llcc1air. et
a1., FPPC No. 88/501, pursuant to Section 83116.
ANALYSTS
We advised you over the telephone that palallents Dade by Mayor
Lancelot Mcclair for fines assessed by the Comrnission in Lancelot
McCIair. et aL, FPPC No. 88/50L, do not offset fines assessed
pursuant to Sectj.cn 91013 by the city of Seaside. The lar., is cLear
on this question. Section 91013 (a) provides in part:
If any person files an original statenent or report
after any deadline inposed by this act, he or she sha11,
doll-ars ($10) per day
statement or report is
Liable in the amount of ten
the deadline until the
i' (Enphasis added. )
′ be
after
filed
Mayor Dlcclair j-s liable for the penalty set forth in Section 91013
in addition to the penalties established under Section 83116
assessed in the Comrnission action. There is no credit or offset.
Your letter also makes reference to a clain by uayor ucclair
that you nay be prevented by a conflict of interest from assessing
the penalties of section 91013.2 we see no conflict of interest
under the Act. Under the Act,
No public official 
at any leveL of state or loca1
government shalL make, participate in naking or in any
way attenpt to use his official position to influence a
governmental decision in which he knows or has reason to
know he has a financial interest.
(Section 87100. )
Thus the Act focuses on the public official's 
"financial
interestrt in determining whether there is a conflict of interest.
Section 87103 defines rtf inancial interesttt to include any source
of income or donor of a gift or j,nterests in busj.ness entities or
2 Tha clain is made in a memorand.un from uayor Mccfair to you
dated June 28, L99o, enclosed with your JuIy 13, L99o, letter.
The memorandum presents few facts or arguments as to why there
might be a conflict of interest. 
The memorandum merely states,
lrlnasrnuch as I am presently interacting with the Fair Polictical-
Isic] Practice Isic] Commission on this subject natter, I question
a City C1erk's conflict of interest position with the Mayor.rr


our rile No. A-9o-487
Page 3
reaL property. 
(Section 87103.) We see none of these interests
affected by your assessing f j.nes provided by the Act.
I trust this letter has provided you with infonnation which
will be of assj.stance to you. If you have any further questions
regarding this matter, please contact ne at (916) 322-590]-.
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
Acting ceneral counsel
,--/l-/**"*
By: Mark Morodomi
Counsel, Legal Division
